title: pelargonium × creniflorum
intro: Pelargonium × creniflorum, also known as the 'Heritage' or 'Old Passions' rose-scented geranium, is a hybrid plant belonging to the geranium family and is native to South Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects, which can help soothe skin irritations and reduce fever. The health benefits of Pelargonium × creniflorum include reducing stress and anxiety, promoting better sleep, and providing relief from digestive issues, making it a popular herbal remedy. Herbal preparations of Pelargonium × creniflorum can be found in teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which are often used in aromatherapy and skincare products.
